nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

en.lifeSummary: When Miles Basset was born about 1195, in Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Miles Basset, was 31 and his mother, Mrs Miles Bassett, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnes Lascelles. He died in 1272, in North Moreton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agnes Lascelles. Il est décédé en 1272, à North Moreton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Miles Basset(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 차플 하들레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Miles Basset(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Miles Bassett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes Lascelles(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 노르스 모레턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.
